issues.title: Location descriptions are raw database values
issues.description: Labels like 'STREET', 'RESIDENCE', 'APARTMENT' are raw values. A citizen expects 'On the street', 'At a residence', 'In an apartment'.
issues.actual: Raw database values in ALL CAPS

issues.title: No way to search for a specific location
issues.description: A citizen wants to find their neighborhood. There is no search box or filter to type a location name.
issues.expected: Search input to filter locations by name
issues.actual: No search functionality; only a static list

issues.title: Maps do not explain what districts/areas mean
issues.description: The choropleth and cluster maps show data points but there is no legend explaining what the dots/circles represent or what 'district' means.
reproduction_steps: Look for explanation of map symbols
issues.expected: Legend explaining map symbols and district boundaries

summary: Locations page shows geographic data but labels are raw database values and maps lack explanations.
